description: Frozen RQ3 FIX2 decision must be pass.
fail_count must equal 0.

RQ3 must include at least 6 corpora.
RQ3 must include at least 4 baseline modes.
Mutation modes must be present for adversarial scope.
FIX2 normalized jurisdiction escape must equal 0.0.
FIX1 raw jurisdiction escape should be recorded for audit traceability.

HSRAG wrong corpus collision must equal 0.0.
HSRAG wrong jurisdiction escape must equal 0.0 after hierarchy normalization.

HSRAG ambiguous false allow must equal 0.0.

HSRAG p95 latency must be below 15ms.
Best baseline should expose nonzero wrong-corpus collision risk.
Best baseline should expose nonzero wrong-jurisdiction escape risk.

zip_sha256 must be present.
